hypothesis: Full int4 QAT replaces int6/int8 post-training quantization. The int6 artifact was 21.9MB (over 16MB budget). Int4 QAT with group_size=128 should produce ~12-14MB artifacts. All CastedLinear replaced with QATLinear. Fake-quantized weights from step 1 with STE gradients. Combined with dual-pass cosine self-distillation Macro sidechannel.

quantization.to: int4 QAT (fake quantize from step 1, STE)
